summary: New Farm Deli has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: proof is not doing enough work.
outreachHook: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
openDesignDirection: New Farm Deli should feel like the obvious restaurant choice in Brisbane. Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials. Rewrite title around "restaurant Deli" while keeping the business name.

captured.title: New Farm Deli and Café: Authentic Italian Dining in Brisbane
headings:
With humble beginnings in 1975 as a small neighbourhood convenience store and deli in the heart of Brisbane, New Farm Deli has since evolved into a cherished community hotspot. Locals flock to buy authentic European delicacies and indulge in quality cafe-style cuisine with an Italian twist.

 More About Our Story

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.impact: The site may feel informational rather than convincing.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "New Farm Deli and Café: Authentic Italian Dining in Brisbane". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Deli".
findings.impact: The page may rank or click worse for the service/location query we care about.
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Deli" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: Meta description is too generic for the lead angle
findings.evidence: Captured meta description does not clearly include "restaurant Deli" or a close variant.
findings.impact: The search snippet may not match high-intent local searches.
findings.fix: Mention service, location, and a concrete result or quote action.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.impact: A single clear H1 helps both search and page comprehension.
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.
